sellers_note: This 2023 Jeep Wrangler Sport combines iconic design with modern capability, offering you a versatile vehicle ready for both daily drives and off-road adventures. - Alpine Premium Audio System - Uconnect 4C Navigation with 8.4'' Touchscreen Display - Apple CarPlay and Google Android Auto - SiriusXM Satellite Radio with 1-Year Guardian Trial - Sky 1-Touch Power Top - Removable Rear Quarter Windows - LED Premium Reflector Headlamps and Front LED Fog Lamps - 4G LTE Wi-Fi Hot Spot - ParkView Rear Back-Up Camera - Front 1-Touch Down Power Windows - Power Heated Mirrors - Remote Keyless Entry with 2-Door Passive Entry - Air Conditioning with Auto Temperature Control - Telescoping and Tilt Steering Wheel - 220 Amp Alternator Powered by a 2.0L I4 DOHC turbocharged engine paired with an 8-Speed Automatic transmission, this Wrangler delivers reliable performance with 21 city MPG and 24 highway MPG. The 4-Wheel Drive system ensures confident handling on various terrains, while the Willys package adds distinctive styling with a black grille, mold-in-color bumper with gloss black accents, and protective rock sills. The interior is thoughtfully appointed with front bucket seats, premium wrapped steering wheel, and a 7.0'' TFT color display cluster. The 8.4'' radio features off-road info pages and integrates seamlessly with your smartphone via Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. Additional comfort features include automatic headlamps, speed-sensitive power locks, and sun visors with illuminated vanity mirrors. The removable rear quarter windows and power top storage bag enhance the open-air experience Jeep owners cherish. This vehicle is Jeep FCA US LLC Certified Pre-Owned, backed by comprehensive benefits. The certification includes a 125 Point Inspection, 24-Hour Towing & Roadside Assistance, transferable warranty coverage, and a CARFAX® Vehicle History Report. You'll also receive a Limited Warranty covering 3 months or 3,000 miles following the original manufacturer warranty, plus a Powertrain Limited Warranty valid for 84 months or 100,000 miles from the original in-service date. Additional perks include car rental allowance and an introductory 3-month subscription to SiriusXM® Satellite Radio with certified warranty upgrades available. Safety is prioritized with dual front impact airbags, dual front side impact airbags, occupant sensing airbags, 4-wheel disc ABS brakes, electronic stability control, brake assist, and integrated roll-over protection. The low tire pressure warning system keeps you informed, while the emergency communication system provides added peace of mind on every journey. With 70,268 miles on the odometer, this Wrangler Sport represents excellent value as a lightly used model that has been thoroughly inspected and certified. Whether you're navigating city streets or exploring rugged trails, this vehicle delivers the versatility and dependability the Wrangler nameplate is known for. Visit our showroom today to experience what this capable machine can offer you.
